steps.t: Uflûmp-mur can be found at the small outpost found at the entrance to Zirakzigil in Durin's Way. Listein has asked you to head east to Uflûmp-mur to f…
The Door to the Clouds is just west of Uflûmp-mur, at the entrance to Zirakzigil in Durin's Way. You have found the ancient shield, and should return …
